en-US.description:
Slatt is a private camera app built for people who actually care where their photos and videos end up.
Everything you capture is stored exclusively on your device in an encrypted sandbox — protected by Face ID or Touch ID. There are no servers, no cloud sync, no analytics, no crash reporters, and no third-party SDKs phoning home. The app has zero internet access. Not even a single network request leaves your phone.
What you get:
· A clean, fast camera with photo and video capture
· A biometric-locked vault only you can open
· The ability to download media back to your Photos library — with Face ID confirmation
· No accounts, no sign-ups, no subscriptions
What we don't do:
· We don't collect your data
· We don't know who you are
· We don't have servers that could be breached
· We don't make money from your attention or your information
Slatt is entirely open source. Every line of code is public — you can verify every claim we make.
Made by Voidback, Inc. — incorporated in Delaware, 2026.
en-US.promoText:
No accounts. 
No ads. 
No analytics. 
No internet connection, ever. 
Just a clean camera, a secure vault, and total privacy.
Built by Voidback, Inc. Fully open source.
en-US.title: Slatt
en-US.subtitle: Capture privately. Always.

review.notes: The app requires no login, and you are welcome to check the source code by clicking the link in the settings.
